title: Is AI ruining our skills? Early results are in – and they're not good
author: Michelangelo11
summary: Nature发表的实证研究指出，过度依赖AI工具可能导致人类认知技能退化，尤其在问题分解、调试和系统性推理方面。对用户构建技术智能系统有警示意义：需设计agent的human-in-the-loop机制与skill-retention评估指标。
key_insight: AI adoption without deliberate skill-scaffolding erodes foundational engineering cognition.
relevance_reason: 直接支撑P0中'production evaluation'目标——该研究提供可量化的认知退化指标，可用于设计agent系统的human capability preservation评估框架，契合evaluation学习路线。
